creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote: > + Xorg 7.2 imported into the ports system. > +

Thanks to the hard work of > + Florent Thoumie (and > + others), the FreeBSD ports collection now uses the modular > + Xorg 7.2 as its default X server. i386 and AMD64 6.2-STABLE > + packages are available and other architectures/releases > + will be available laster, or you can compile it from ^^^^^^ typo > + source. In both cases, see the 20070519 entry in > + /usr/ports/UPDATING on how to upgrade. Please track ">-ports > + for last minute information. > +

> + Cheers, remko -- Kind regards, Remko Lodder ** remko@elvandar.org FreeBSD ** remko@FreeBSD.org /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
